title: NHSRC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Consultant Posts
description: The National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Consultant Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.Pharm, Pharm D, M.Pharm, and MBA can grab this chance and apply for the NHSRC Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs th...
